meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Speed Up Development with Antigravity
content.seo_description: Overcome slow development cycles with the Antigravity project template. A beginner-friendly, expert-led checklist to ship faster using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development cycles, adopt the Antigravity template to standardize your architecture. By pairing this scaffold with Claude Code’s autonomous execution, you reduce boilerplate overhead by 80%. This systematic approach allows you to focus on high-value features, impress clients with rapid delivery, and maintain a scalable, professional-grade codebase.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your project, and you’re still wrestling with folder structures, dependency hell, and repetitive boilerplate. Every hour spent configuring a new environment is an hour lost on the features that actually pay the bills. You aren't just building an app; you are building a business, and slow development is the silent killer of your freelance margins.

Relief has arrived in the form of the Antigravity project template. Designed for builders who demand speed without sacrificing quality, this framework acts as a force multiplier. By integrating it with Claude Code, you transform from a manual coder into an architect, orchestrating high-level logic while the machine handles the heavy lifting of implementation.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a production-ready foundation immediately. This eliminates configuration drift and ensures your project starts with best practices baked in.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity base template with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define Domain Models
steps.description: Use AI to map out your database schema and types. Clear models prevent technical debt and simplify future feature expansion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the database schema and TypeScript interfaces for a SaaS user management system including profiles, roles, and subscription status.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate prisma schema and types based on user requirements"

steps.title: Automate API Route Generation
steps.description: Stop writing CRUD endpoints manually. Leverage templates to ensure your API layer is consistent and secure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create RESTful API endpoints for the identified resources using the standard Antigravity controller pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "create crud endpoints for profiles table"

steps.title: Component Library Integration
steps.description: Inject your UI design system into the scaffold to ensure visual consistency across the entire client project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the core UI components from the Antigravity library, focusing on responsive layouts and accessible form inputs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "install and configure core ui components"

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Setup
steps.description: Automate your CI/CD flow so that every commit is tested and deployed, ensuring you never have to manually push code again.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a GitHub Actions workflow for the Antigravity template to handle linting, testing, and deployment to Vercel.

pro_tips: Always keep a 'custom-components' directory outside the main template to prevent overwrite issues during framework updates.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your API endpoints as you build them to ensure 90%+ coverage automatically.
Leverage environment variable validation in your Antigravity config to catch configuration errors before they hit production.
Standardize your git commit messages using a conventional commit hook to keep your project history clean and readable for clients.
Use the 'watch' mode in your development server to see hot-reloaded changes instantly, cutting your feedback loop by seconds.
content.next_steps: Once your initial project is live, iterate by adding custom features and modularizing your components into a private npm package for future clients.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your tools and start shipping the work that defines your career. You have the blueprint, the framework, and the automation stack to scale your freelance output indefinitely. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
